tab_characters.text:
Who do you want to stalk?

Mom is actually smiling. It's terrifying.

Professional distance.
        [b]JUN (16)[/b]
        [i]Sleepy eyes, sharp jawline. Looks cool, is actually a soft marshmallow. Likely to be found eating ramen in a closet.[/i]
        [b]COCO (17)[/b]
        [i]Lethal dancer. Cat eyes. Expensive aura. Or maybe they're just better than you.[/i]
        [b]HANEUL (17)[/b]
        [i]Dewy skin, tea-colored eyes. Looks like they were born in a castle, but secretly hates the spotlight.[/i]

branches.content:
[b]YOON NA-RI (17)[/b]
                [i]Now known by her real name, Yoon Na-ri is a teenage prodigy who debuted at 13. Her tall, feminine frame and sun-kissed tan skin remain striking, but her soulful brown eyes now carry the weight of her legacy. Underneath the "Perfect Idol" mask, she is rebellious and treats you as an equal.[/i]

[b]MENTOR NOA (17)[/b]
                [i]A famous solo artist and judge on Project: Supernova. Known for her harsh critiques and incredible stage presence, her soulful, deep brown eyes radiate a warmth that provides a subtle contrast to the cold efficiency of the survival show.[/i]
        [b]HAN MIN-JAE (19)[/b]
        [i]Wolf cut, green eyes. Warned you to run away. You didn't listen.[/i]

choices.resultText:
[b]MOTHER:[/b] Sharp elegance. Her love language is criticism.
        [b]FATHER:[/b] Quiet confidence. Worn down by capitalism.

[b]RIO (17):[/b] Short, explosive energy. A walking vitamin shot.
        [b]KANG (18):[/b] Built like a tank. Stoic. Practices dance moves in their sleep.

[b]JI-WON (17):[/b] Analytical eyes. Calculates debut probability while eating salad.
        [b]YURI (15):[/b] Fairy visual. The sharpest 'Golden Maknae' in the business.
[b]EDEN (28):[/b] Genius producer. Looks like a vampire who lives in the studio.

tab_glossary.text:
[b]📖 THE DICTIONARY OF SUFFERING[/b]
[i](A guide to K-Pop terminology used in the game)[/i]
[b] HONORIFICS (FAMILY & RESPECT)[/b]
[b]Sunbae / Hoobae (선배 / 후배):[/b]
Senior / Junior. The hierarchy is absolute. If they debuted one day before you, they are your Sunbae. Bow 90 degrees or die socially.
[b]Hyung / Oppa (형 / 오빠):[/b]
"Older Brother". Used by males (Hyung) or females (Oppa) to address an older male. Can be affectionate or just polite.
[b]Noona / Unnie (누나 / 언니):[/b]
"Older Sister". Used by males (Noona) or females (Unnie) to address an older female.
[b]-Nim (님):[/b]
A suffix of high respect (e.g., "Sunbae-nim", "Teacher-nim"). Adding it shows you know your place.
[b]🗣️ DAILY LIFE & SLANG[/b]
[b]Daebak (대박):[/b]
"Awesome" or "Huge Success". Used when something goes viral or when you are genuinely shocked.
[b]Hwaiting (화이팅):[/b]
"Fighting!" A phrase used to cheer someone on or wish them luck before a performance.
[b]Pali-pali (빨리빨리):[/b]
"Hurry, hurry!" The unspoken motto of Korean society. If you aren't running, you're late.
[b]Aegyo (애교):[/b]
Acting overly cute and childlike to charm fans. Required even if you are a 25-year-old rapper with a deep voice.
[b]Skinship (스킨십):[/b]
Physical intimacy between friends (holding hands, hugging). Fans obsess over analyzing these moments.
[b]Nugu (누구):[/b]
Literally "Who?". A derogatory term for unpopular groups or idols that nobody knows.
[b]T-Time / Ment:[/b]
The "Talking Time" during a concert or show where idols stop singing to talk to the audience. Usually scripted.
[b]🎭 INDUSTRY TERMS[/b]
[b]Maknae (막내):[/b]
The youngest member. Responsible for being cute (Aegyo) and doing the chores, but often secretly runs the group ("Maknae on Top").
[b]All-Rounder:[/b]
An idol who has no weakness—good at Vocals, Dance, and Rap. The rarest type of trainee.
[b]Visual / Face Genius:[/b]
A member so undeniably good-looking that their face alone is considered a talent.
[b]Ending Fairy:[/b]
The member who gets the final close-up shot. You must stare into the camera and pant heavily (even if you aren't tired).
[b]Kkondae (꼰대):[/b]
An older person who is condescending, rigid, and demands respect just because of their age. A "Boomer".
[b]🧠 CONCEPTS & EMOTIONS[/b]
[b]Han (한):[/b]
A deep sorrow, resentment, and injustice that builds up over time. It is the fuel for great art.
[b]Jeong (정):[/b]
A deep connection. It goes beyond love—it is loyalty and shared attachment, even towards people you might hate.
[b]Nunchi (눈치):[/b]
The art of "reading the room". The ability to gauge the mood instantly. Essential for survival.
[b]Kki (끼):[/b]
The "X-Factor" or star quality. You can't learn it in a classroom; you have to be born with it.
[b]Eumsaek (음색):[/b]
"Vocal Tone" or "Voice Color". Having a unique vocal texture that is instantly recognizable.
[b]4D Personality:[/b]
Someone eccentric and quirky (thinking in the 4th Dimension). Fans love them because they are unpredictable.
[b]Sasaeng (사생):[/b]
Obsessive "fans" who stalk idols, invade privacy, and commit crimes to get attention.
